treasury.name: Treasury
treasury.body: During the Harvest phase, choose one province you control. That province provides no income (no gold from Farmers, Mines, or Caravans). Instead, you receive exactly 8 gold.
treasury.summary: Gain 8 gold instead of province income
treasury.details: Played during Harvest. Best used on a province with few farmers or when the Nile level is low and income would otherwise be minimal.

abundance.name: Abundance
abundance.body: During the Harvest phase, choose one province you control. Each Farmer in that province (including printed ones) earns 1 additional gold.
abundance.summary: +1 gold per farmer in one province
abundance.details: Synergizes with high-farmer provinces like Avaris or Damanhur to boost revenue during good flood years.

architect.name: Architect
architect.body: On your turn, you may immediately build a pyramid using only 2 building stones instead of the usual 3. One-time use.
architect.details: Saves one stone. Since stones get progressively more expensive in the market, this card often saves 3-5 gold.

theft.name: Theft (The Thief)
theft.body: During the Offering phase, you steal 3 gold from the total offering. You gain 3 gold, and the Nile flood level is reduced. You receive NO gifts from Amun-Re this round.
theft.summary: Steal 3 gold from temple; receive no gifts
theft.details: A double-edged sword. You gain money and can keep the flood low (helping Caravans), but you forfeit the chance to gain free stones/farmers/cards from the offering rewards.

bribery.name: Bribery
bribery.body: During the Auction phase, if you have been outbid on a province, you may play this card to place a higher bid on that same province immediately.
bribery.details: Standard rules normally force you to move to a different province when outbid. This lets you fight for a specific location you desperately need.

protection.name: Protection
protection.body: When you bid on a province, play this to block the bidding space immediately above yours. Another player must bid at least 2 spaces higher to outbid you.
protection.details: Makes it much more expensive for opponents to kick you out of a province. Excellent for securing a province cheaply.

vizier.name: The Vizier
vizier.body: When the offerings are revealed, you may increase or decrease the total offering value by 3. This affects the final Nile flood level.
vizier.summary: +3 or -3 to the total Nile offering
vizier.details: Use this to manipulate the flood level to benefit your specific setup (e.g., lowering it for Caravans or raising it for Farmers).

schemes.name: Schemes (Bonus Cards)
schemes.body: Keep these hidden. At the end of the Old and New Kingdoms, gain 3 VP if you meet the condition (e.g., Most Farmers, Most Gold, Most Cards, 3 Provinces in one region).
schemes.details: There are 6 different types. You cannot score two identical schemes in the same era, but you can score different ones.
